query: SELECT name FROM establishments WHERE categoryId = (SELECT id FROM categories WHERE slug = 'saudavel') AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%açaí%' AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%acai%' AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%juice%' AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%suco%' AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%salad%' AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%fit%' AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%vegan%' AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%natural%' AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%orgânic%' AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%saudável%' AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%saudavel%' AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%poke%' ORDER BY name LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT name FROM establishments WHERE categoryId = (SELECT id FROM categories WHERE slug = 'saudavel') AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%açaí%' AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%acai%' AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%juice%' AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%suco%' AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%salad%' AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%fit%' AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%vegan%' AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%natural%' AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%orgânic%' AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%saudável%' AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%saudavel%' AND LOWER(name) NOT LIKE '%poke%' ORDER BY name LIMIT 20;
